en.name: Level 62 — Jungle Backyard
en.shortDescription: A deteriorating backyard ringed by impossibly tall walls, with a jungle reachable through a breach and one aggressive hound in residence.
en.atmosphere: Decrepit and overgrown, the dilapidated house showing signs of violent disturbance and lingering danger.
en.tips: Avoid the aggressive hound. Stay in the forest about a week to exit. The deeper jungle jams tracking. Approach brick walls with care.
